title: Avatar: Fire And Ash To Burn Bright Over Christmas With $75M As Anaconda, Marty Supreme & Song Sung Blue Open
text: Sony's comedic remake of the 1997 thriller Anaconda is positioned to earn $20M+ at 3,400 locations during the Christmas weekend, placing it in second position behind Avatar: Fire and Ash. The film received poor reviews, with only 39% on Rotten Tomatoes from critics. Despite critical panning, the Jack Black and Paul Rudd vehicle shows strength with its target demographic. The production notes that first choice and unaided awareness for the $45M net production is best with guys under 25. The film benefits from an extended release window, with previews beginning at noon the day before Christmas and Thursday showtimes starting as early as 9 AM at 2,900 locations. Analysts observe that Anaconda is the only place for laughs this Christmas, suggesting it captures the comedy-seeking audience during a holiday period dominated by action-adventure and drama releases.
